# programs.yubikey-touch-detector

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `programs.yubikey-touch-detector`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `programs.yubikey-touch-detector.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable yubikey-touch-detector. |
| `programs.yubikey-touch-detector.libnotify` | `boolean` | If set to true, yubikey-touch-detctor will send notifications using libnotify |
| `programs.yubikey-touch-detector.unixSocket` | `boolean` | If set to true, yubikey-touch-detector will send notifications to a unix socket |
| `programs.yubikey-touch-detector.verbose` | `boolean` | Enables verbose logging |
